reading_units.text: 天地玄黃　宇宙洪荒

layers.translation_en: Heaven is dark, earth golden; the cosmos is vast and sparse.

reading_units.text: 日月盈昃　辰宿列張

layers.translation_en: Sun and moon wax and wane; the stars are fixed in their constellations.

reading_units.text: 寒來暑往　秋收冬藏

layers.translation_en: Cold follows warmth in due cycle; in autumn, food is gathered for winter.

reading_units.text: 閏餘成歲　律呂調陽

layers.translation_en: Extra days complete the year; tuning harmonizes yin and yang .

reading_units.text: 雲騰致雨　露結為霜

layers.translation_en: Clouds ascend to cause rain to fall; morning dew transforms to white frost.

reading_units.text: 金生麗水　玉出崑岡

layers.translation_en: Gold from the Li River; Jade from Kunlun region.

reading_units.text: 劍號巨闕　珠稱夜光

layers.translation_en: Sword named ‘Great Summit’; pearl named ‘Night Glow’.

reading_units.text: 果珍李柰　菜重芥薑

layers.translation_en: Of fruits most prized are pears and crab-apples; of seasonings most valued are mustard and ginger.

reading_units.text: 海鹹河淡　鱗潛羽翔

layers.translation_en: Sea is salt, rivers are fresh; fish dive below, birds soar on high.

reading_units.text: 龍師火帝　鳥官人皇

layers.translation_en: ‘Dragon Master’, ‘Fire Emperor’, ‘Bird Ruler’, ‘Sovereign of Men’.

reading_units.text: 始製文字　乃服衣裳

layers.translation_en: Birth of writing and culture then clothes were worn.

reading_units.text: 推位讓國　有虞陶唐

layers.translation_en: The succession to the throne; passed on to Yu, Tao Tang.

reading_units.text: 吊民伐罪　周發殷湯

layers.translation_en: Support the people and punish crimes; as Zhou Fa and Yin Tang did.

reading_units.text: 坐朝問道　垂拱平章

layers.translation_en: They sat at court pondering the Way; handing down guidance for a peaceful life.

reading_units.text: 愛育黎首　臣伏戎羌

layers.translation_en: With love they nurtured their people; overcoming by force the wild tribes.

reading_units.text: 遐邇壹體　率賓歸王

layers.translation_en: Both far and near were joined as one; visitors acknowledged the ruler.

reading_units.text: 鳴鳳在竹　白駒食場

layers.translation_en: Then the male phoenix called from the bamboo thicket and the white foal grazed in the courtyard.

reading_units.text: 化被草木　賴及萬方

layers.translation_en: Transformation spread even to the grass and trees; sincerity extended everywhere.

reading_units.text: 蓋此身髮　四大五常

layers.translation_en: Our human bodies (to the tips of our hairs) live under four great elements and five constant virtues.

reading_units.text: 恭惟鞠養　豈敢毀傷

layers.translation_en: Honor those that raised you; do not contemplate harming yourself.

reading_units.text: 女慕貞絜　男效才良

layers.translation_en: Girls should seek chastity and purity; boys aspire to talent and virtue.

reading_units.text: 知過必改　得能莫忘

layers.translation_en: Recognize faults you must correct; make use of the skills you possess.

reading_units.text: 罔談彼短　靡恃己長

layers.translation_en: Do not point out the faults of others; do not waste your own abilities.

reading_units.text: 信使可覆　器欲難量

layers.translation_en: Your truthfulness must withstand challenge; mere capabilities are hard to gauge.

reading_units.text: 墨悲絲染　詩贊羔羊

layers.translation_en: Mozi was grieved that silk had been dyed; as described in the poem ‘The Lamb’.

reading_units.text: 景行維賢　剋念作聖

layers.translation_en: Enlightened actions maintain worthiness; restrain yourself from too much study to become wise.

reading_units.text: 德建名立　形端表正

layers.translation_en: Virtue establishes respectability; the upright have correct appearance.

reading_units.text: 空谷傳聲　虛堂習聽

layers.translation_en: An empty valley just spreads sound; but even the most modest of halls permits study by attentive listening.

reading_units.text: 禍因惡積　福緣善慶

layers.translation_en: Calamity is the reward for accumulating evil; good fortune is the just reward for benevolence.

reading_units.text: 尺辟非寶　寸陰是競

layers.translation_en: A foot length of precious jade is not to be valued; rather struggle for just an inch of time.

reading_units.text: 資父事君　曰嚴與敬

layers.translation_en: Sustain your father and serve your lord; that is to say rigorously and respectfully.

reading_units.text: 孝當竭力　忠則盡命

layers.translation_en: Devoted to parents to the utmost; loyal to the end of your life.

reading_units.text: 臨深履薄　夙興溫清

layers.translation_en: Take care when approaching chasms and walking on thin ice; in the morning rise early whether warm or cold.

reading_units.text: 似蘭斯馨　如松之盛

layers.translation_en: Like the orchid in fragrance; as the pine flourishes.

reading_units.text: 川流不息　淵澄取映

layers.translation_en: The river flows without ceasing; deep, unruffled waters allow reflection.

reading_units.text: 容止若思　言辭安定

layers.translation_en: Let your manner by thoughtful; may what you say be calm and disciplined.

reading_units.text: 篤初誠美　慎終宜令

layers.translation_en: To begin earnestly is truly excellent; but carefulness to see it through is equally honorable.

reading_units.text: 榮業所基　籍甚無竟

layers.translation_en: Prodigious study forms the foundation; and then your good reputation will be limitless.

reading_units.text: 學優登仕　攝職從政

layers.translation_en: Excel in studies and become an official; master your duties to join in the work of government.

reading_units.text: 存以甘棠　去而益詠

layers.translation_en: While alive, work under the sweet pear tree; when dead, people will still sing your praises.

reading_units.text: 樂殊貴賤　禮別尊卑

layers.translation_en: Music differentiates the noble and the base; decorum the superior and inferior.

reading_units.text: 上和下睦　夫唱婦隨

layers.translation_en: With superiors have peace, with inferiors harmony; as the husband's song is accompanied by his wife.

reading_units.text: 外受傅訓　入奉母儀

layers.translation_en: Out of doors accept your tutor's instruction; at home show respect for mother's counsels.

reading_units.text: 諸姑伯叔　猶子比兒

layers.translation_en: Towards each aunt and uncle; be just like you were their own child.

reading_units.text: 孔懷兄弟　同氣連枝

layers.translation_en: Care deeply about your brothers; they share the same breath as yourself and are like branches of the same tree.

reading_units.text: 交友投分　切磨箴規

layers.translation_en: In friendship each must do their part; cut and polish yourself or else beware!

reading_units.text: 仁慈隱惻　造次弗離

layers.translation_en: Generosity, compassion and tender-feeling; it would be rash to abandon them.

reading_units.text: 節義廉退　顛沛匪虧

layers.translation_en: If integrity, justice and honesty are in decline; even though when overwhelmed these should never be lacking.

reading_units.text: 性靜情逸　心動神疲

layers.translation_en: If your nature is calm, the passions will be subdued; but when the heart is agitated the spirit is wearied.

reading_units.text: 守真誌滿　逐物意移

layers.translation_en: Maintaining purity brings fulfillment; but if you pursue distractions your purpose will waver.

reading_units.text: 堅持雅操　好爵自縻

layers.translation_en: Firmly grasp fine aspirations; innate nobility will shield you.

reading_units.text: 都邑華夏　東西二京

layers.translation_en: The ancient capitals were splendid and glorious; both Eastern and Western capital cities.

reading_units.text: 背邙面洛　浮渭據涇

layers.translation_en: The first of these is backed by Mount Mang and fronted by the River Luo; around the other is the swift Wei and the meandering Jing rivers.

reading_units.text: 宮殿盤鬱　樓觀飛驚

layers.translation_en: Their palaces and halls were densely arrayed; the buildings so high that looking down inspired fear of plunging down.

reading_units.text: 圖寫禽獸　畫彩仙靈

layers.translation_en: Drawings were made of birds and animals; depictions of immortals and deities.

reading_units.text: 丙舍傍啟　甲帳對楹

layers.translation_en: Splendid apartments opened out on each side; fine drapes adorn the parallel rows of pillars.

reading_units.text: 肆筵設席　鼓瑟吹笙

layers.translation_en: There were spread out lavish banquets; and there were played the drum, harp and the sheng was blown.

reading_units.text: 升階納陛　弁轉疑星

layers.translation_en: Ascending the steps to the throne; with the whirling hats of officials as numberless as the stars.

reading_units.text: 右通廣內　左達承明

layers.translation_en: On the right is the library; on the left the scholars' dormitory.

reading_units.text: 既集墳典　亦聚群英

layers.translation_en: There can be found the most ancient books and records; and also a host of wise men.

reading_units.text: 杜稿鐘隸　漆書壁經

layers.translation_en: Du’s cursive style and Zhong’s formal style; ancient lacquered books and classics concealed in a wall.

reading_units.text: 府羅將相　路俠槐卿

layers.translation_en: In the mansions senior officials assemble in order; the junior grades flank their path down the road.

reading_units.text: 戶封八縣　家給千兵

layers.translation_en: Some of these households will be granted eight counties; and to these families a thousand troops.

reading_units.text: 高冠陪輦　驅轂振纓

layers.translation_en: With their high hats they accompany the Imperial carriage; their ribbons flutter with the rapid stir.

reading_units.text: 世祿侈富　車駕肥輕

layers.translation_en: Their inherited wealth gives plenteous riches; their carriages are pulled by sturdy but light steeds.

reading_units.text: 策功茂實　勒碑刻銘

layers.translation_en: Their noble plans are many and attested; they are carved on stones as inscriptions.

reading_units.text: 磻溪伊尹　佐時阿衡

layers.translation_en: At Pan brook he hired a man and also Yi Yin; both assisted for a while and became chief ministers.

reading_units.text: 奄宅曲阜　微旦孰營

layers.translation_en: Within Yan is the city of Qufu; who but the Duke of Zhou could have built it?

reading_units.text: 桓公匡合　濟弱扶傾

layers.translation_en: The Duke of Huan put things in order and united the people; he helped the feeble and revived the stricken.

reading_units.text: 綺回漢惠　說感武丁

layers.translation_en: Qi returned to aid Han Hui; influenced Wu Ding in a dream.

reading_units.text: 俊乂密勿　多士寔寧

layers.translation_en: The talented scholars regulate access to state secrets; and the many who cultivate true peace.

reading_units.text: 晉楚更覇　趙魏困橫

layers.translation_en: The Jin and Chu states became tyrannical; the states of Zhao and Wei fell into misery and lawlessness.

reading_units.text: 假途滅虢　踐土會盟

layers.translation_en: Feigning a march the Jin army destroyed the state of Guo; at Jian Tu the rulers signed a treaty.

reading_units.text: 何遵約法　韓弊煩刑

layers.translation_en: Xiao Hé advocated simple laws; he followed Han (Fei)'s philosophy but suffered cruelly under the laws that he himself instigated.

reading_units.text: 起翦頗牧　用軍冣精

layers.translation_en: The famous generals Qi, Jian, Po and Mu were pre-eminent in tactics.

reading_units.text: 宣威沙漠　馳譽丹青

layers.translation_en: Tales of their ascendancy reached even the deserts; their reputation swiftly spread and they are immortalized in paintings.

reading_units.text: 九州禹跡　百郡秦併

layers.translation_en: All the nine regions of China bear the traces of Yu the Great; All the hundred districts united by the Qin.

reading_units.text: 嶽宗泰岱　禪主云亭

layers.translation_en: Of the sacred mountains Taishan is the most honored; at its base are altars at Yun and Ting

reading_units.text: 雁門紫塞　雞田赤城

layers.translation_en: The Yanmen pass and the Great Wall; Ji Tian station and Chicheng mountain.

reading_units.text: 昆池碣石　鉅野洞庭

layers.translation_en: Kunming Pool and Jieshi Rocks; Juye Wasteland and Dongting Lake.

reading_units.text: 曠遠緜邈　巖岫杳冥

layers.translation_en: They are vast and distant, enduring forever; shaded cliffs and caverns shrouded in gloom.

reading_units.text: 治本於農　務茲稼穡

layers.translation_en: Sound management of agriculture is vital - always give attention to farm work.

reading_units.text: 俶載南畝　我藝黍稷

layers.translation_en: The year begins in the southern fields; I cultivate the cereal crop.

reading_units.text: 稅熟貢新　勸賞黜陟

layers.translation_en: The tax due on ripe grain spurs the cultivation of the new crop; indolence is punished, hard-work rewarded.

reading_units.text: 孟軻敦素　史魚秉直

layers.translation_en: Mencius was kind-hearted and genuine; Shi Yu was steadfastly truthful.

reading_units.text: 庶幾中庸　勞謙謹敕

layers.translation_en: They neared the Golden Medium; striving for modesty and obeying orders.

reading_units.text: 聆音察理　鑒貌辨色

layers.translation_en: Listen to what is said and examine its logic; scrutinize people's countenance and their appearance.

reading_units.text: 貽厥嘉猷　勉其祗植

layers.translation_en: Make your exemplary principles your legacy; exert yourself so as to nurture respectfulness.

reading_units.text: 省躬譏誡　寵增抗極

layers.translation_en: Scrutinize yourself when mocked and admonished; zealously guard against praise that may inflate self-esteem.

reading_units.text: 殆辱近恥　林皋幸即

layers.translation_en: When malevolent dishonor and disgrace comes near; spend time visiting the woods and streams.

reading_units.text: 兩疏見機　解組誰逼

layers.translation_en: The two Shu brothers observing other's intentions resigned from office, no-one compelled them.

reading_units.text: 索居閒處　沉默寂寥

layers.translation_en: Look for a tranquil place to live; to meditate alone.

reading_units.text: 求古尋論　散慮逍遙

layers.translation_en: Seek out and ponder on ancient writings; dispel worries and take your leisure.

reading_units.text: 欣奏累遣　慼謝歡招

layers.translation_en: Enjoy music to banish tension; troubles wane as joy is welcomed.

reading_units.text: 渠荷的歷　園莽抽條

layers.translation_en: In the waterways the lotus plant grows; in the countryside lush wild-flowers flourish.

reading_units.text: 枇杷晚翠　梧桐早凋

layers.translation_en: The Loquat tree retains its green leaves; while the Wutong tree's leaves are early to fade.

reading_units.text: 陳根委翳　落葉飄搖

layers.translation_en: Old roots suffer from decay and are cast aside; the fallen leaves float down forlornly in the wind.

reading_units.text: 游鵾獨運　凌摩絳霄

layers.translation_en: The huge, roaming bird journeys alone; soaring to touch the purple heavens.

reading_units.text: 耽讀玩市　庽目囊箱

layers.translation_en: Read for fun at the market; with a roving eye look for new boxes of books.

reading_units.text: 易輶攸畏　屬耳垣牆

layers.translation_en: Gossip and rash talk should be dreaded as even apartment walls have ears.

reading_units.text: 具膳餐飯　適口充腸

layers.translation_en: When preparing meals eat plain food which suits the palate and fills the stomach.

reading_units.text: 飽飫烹宰　饑厭糟糠

layers.translation_en: Gluttons will gorge on boiled meat; the starving will relish even the poorest husks.

reading_units.text: 親戚故舊　老少異糧

layers.translation_en: Relatives and old friends; the old and the young like different food.

reading_units.text: 妾御績紡　侍巾帷房

layers.translation_en: The concubines run the chores; they do the laundry and tidy rooms.

reading_units.text: 紈扇圓絜　銀燭煒煌

layers.translation_en: White silk fans round and unblemished; silver light of brilliant candles.

reading_units.text: 晝眠夕寐　藍筍象床

layers.translation_en: For snoozing at noon and sleeping at night; blue bamboo mats and ivory framed beds.

reading_units.text: 弦歌酒宴　接杯舉觴

layers.translation_en: Amidst music and feasting; raise the goblet and make a toast.

reading_units.text: 矯手頓足　悅豫且康

layers.translation_en: Wave the hands and stomp your feet; everyone is joyful and at ease.

reading_units.text: 嫡後嗣續　祭祀烝嘗

layers.translation_en: May the principal heir endure; offer sacrifices at the appropriate season.

reading_units.text: 稽顙再拜　悚懼恐惶

layers.translation_en: Kowtowing to the ground repeatedly; in dread, awe and trembling.

reading_units.text: 箋牒簡要　顧答審詳

layers.translation_en: In correspondence be concise; give carefully considered and comprehensive replies.

reading_units.text: 骸垢想浴　執熱願涼

layers.translation_en: When dirty to the bone we desire a bath; when we grasp something too hot we crave coolness.

reading_units.text: 驢騾犢特　駭躍超驤

layers.translation_en: Just as donkeys, camels, calves and bullocks do when startled - they leap around and take flight.

reading_units.text: 誅斬賊盜　捕獲叛亡

layers.translation_en: Punish by beheading thieves, traitors and robbers; seize the rebels who flee.

reading_units.text: 布射僚丸　嵇琴阮嘯

layers.translation_en: Lu Bu the archer, Yi Liao the juggler; Ji Kang the musician and Ruan Ji the flute player.

reading_units.text: 恬筆倫紙　鈞巧任釣

layers.translation_en: Tian invented the writing brush, Lun paper; Jun was an inventor, Ren an angler.

reading_units.text: 釋紛利俗　竝皆佳妙

layers.translation_en: They all overcame life's difficulties and brought benefits to all; taken together they were all marvelous.

reading_units.text: 毛施淑姿　工顰妍笑

layers.translation_en: Mao and Shi were benevolent and beautiful; even while working their frowns were charming.

reading_units.text: 年矢每催　曦暉朗曜

layers.translation_en: Years pass like flying arrows each in urgent haste; but the sun continues to shine bright and glorious.

reading_units.text: 璇璣懸斡　晦魄環照

layers.translation_en: The Big Dipper hangs and turns in the sky; the pale moonlight encompasses the luminous earth.

reading_units.text: 指薪修祜　永綏吉劭

layers.translation_en: Like the tinder that lights fires; always encourage and then good fortune will be the reward for effort.

reading_units.text: 矩步引領　俯仰廊廟

layers.translation_en: Regulate your pace and lead the way; bowing at the Imperial court.

reading_units.text: 束帶矜莊　徘徊瞻眺

layers.translation_en: Girt with your belt esteemed and grand; walking with hesitancy as you gaze around your lands.

reading_units.text: 孤陋寡聞　愚蒙等誚

layers.translation_en: Fools and numbskulls; dunderheads and the absurd may deride you.

reading_units.text: 謂語助者　焉哉乎也

layers.translation_en: At last these will help: that's it, all done, finito, the end.

chapter.summary: 天地玄黃　宇宙洪荒

策功茂實　勒碑刻銘
磻溪伊尹　佐時阿衡

宣威沙漠　馳譽丹青

嶽宗恆岱　禪主云亭

孟軻敦素　史魚秉直
庶幾中庸　勞謙謹敕
聆音察理　鑑貌辨色
貽厥嘉猷　勉其祗植
省躬譏誡　寵增抗極
殆辱近恥　林皋幸即
兩疏見機　解組誰逼
索居閒處　沈默寂寥
求古尋論　散慮逍遙
欣奏累遣　慼謝歡招
渠荷的歷　園莽抽條
枇杷晚翠　梧桐早凋
陳根委翳　落葉飄颻
游鵾獨運　凌摩絳霄
耽讀翫市　寓目囊箱
易輶攸畏　屬耳垣牆
具膳餐飯　適口充腸
飽飫烹宰　飢厭糟糠
親戚故舊　老少異糧
妾御績紡　侍巾帷房
紈扇圓潔　銀燭煒煌
晝眠夕寐　籃筍象牀
弦歌酒讌　接杯舉觴
矯手頓足　悅豫且康
嫡後嗣續　祭祀烝嘗
稽顙再拜　悚懼恐惶
箋牒簡要　顧答審詳
骸垢想浴　執熱願涼
驢騾犢特　駭躍超驤
誅斬賊盜　捕獲叛亡
布射遼丸　嵇琴阮嘯
恬筆倫紙　鈞巧任釣
釋紛利俗　並皆佳妙
毛施淑姿　工顰妍笑
年矢每催　曦暉朗耀
璇璣懸斡　晦魄環照
指薪脩祜　永綏吉劭
矩步引領　俯仰廊廟
束帶矜莊　徘徊瞻眺
孤陋寡聞　愚蒙等誚
謂語助者　焉哉乎也
